commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=55c3bff6ae73188aa0c50a885e7ebbc3d47122b7)
commands.review_summary:
The PR expands strict inline-eval detection and allowlist-pattern recognition for versioned interpreter names plus PHP/R inline-code flags, with detector and node-host regression tests.

PR surface: Source +33, Tests +18. Total +51 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main only recognizes exact interpreter names and the existing detector feeds the strictInlineEval denial path. I did not run a live node-host reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The protected maintainer label, missing real behavior proof, intentional stricter approval behavior, and small dependency-contract cleanup make this a human review item rather than a repair-lane candidate.

target.title: fix(exec): gate versioned inline interpreters
target.body:
## Summary

Tightens strict inline-eval approval detection so additional interpreter forms cannot bypass the existing approval guard when interpreter executables are otherwise allowlisted.

## Changes

- Matches version-suffixed Python and PyPy executable names when resolving inline-eval interpreter specs.
- Adds PHP inline-code flags `-B`, `-E`, and `-R`, and R/Rscript `-e` and `--exec` to the detector table.
- Applies the same interpreter matching to allowlist-pattern recognition so allow-always persistence remains suppressed for these interpreter targets.
- Adds focused detector and handler-level regression coverage.

## Validation

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/infra/command-analysis/inline-eval.test.ts src/node-host/invoke-system-run.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/infra/command-analysis/inline-eval.ts src/infra/command-analysis/inline-eval.test.ts src/node-host/invoke-system-run.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` clean

## Notes

Security-sensitive report details are tracked privately. `CHANGELOG.md` was not updated.
target.author: eleqtrizit

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
